about.title: About Me
about.intro1: I'm a full-stack .NET developer with hands-on experience building web and mobile apps with React, TypeScript, and React Native.
about.intro2: Before moving into tech, I worked as a teacher, and that background still shapes how I work today. It helps me listen closely, understand what users actually need, collaborate well in teams, and turn complex problems into solutions that are clear and maintainable.
about.intro3: I'm curious by nature and enjoy learning new tools and approaches. Whatever I build, I always aim for it to be secure, robust, accessible, and genuinely useful for the people using it.

hero.title: Theres Östgård - full-stack .NET developer
hero.subtitle: I build thoughtful digital solutions with a range of modern technologies. Curious what I can create? Take a look at my projects below.

p1.title: Multiplication App
p1.description: A playful app for practicing multiplication. Built to support learning through repetition while exploring React Native.

p2.title: ConsoleUtilityHub
p2.description: A modular console app with tools such as a calculator, shape utilities, and Rock Paper Scissors. Built with Spectre.Console for a richer CLI experience.

p3.title: ChatterBox
p3.description: A customer support chatbot web app with a clearly defined persona and response boundaries. Powered by Azure OpenAI.

p4.title: SCB Charts
p4.description: A scalable web app that visualizes data from Statistics Sweden through interactive charts. Focused on API integration, data visualization, and team collaboration.

p5.title: ElevatorSimulator
p5.description: An elevator system simulator for a high-rise building. Showcases Clean Architecture principles in a .NET backend with a React frontend.

p6.title: Web Portfolio
p6.description: My personal portfolio site where I showcase projects and skills. Built with React, TypeScript, and Vite.

p7.title: AdAPI
p7.description: A RESTful API for managing advertisements, built with C# and .NET. It includes endpoints for creating, retrieving, updating, and deleting ad records, following API design best practices.

p8.title: WhereIsIt
p8.description: A mobile app that helps users keep track of their belongings and where they are. Built with React Native and Supabase, with RevenueCat for in-app purchases. In the process of being published to Google Play!

contact.title: Contact
contact.lead: I'd love to hear about your project, your ideas, or your questions. If you have a job opportunity, feel free to reach out and I'll get back to you as soon as I can.
contact.emailNote: Prefer email? Send a note to {{email}}.
contact.error: Failed to send message. See console for details.
